description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures, two children and an adult, gathered around a rectangular table set on a raised stone platform. The table holds a large bust of a head, a bird, and several smaller objects, suggesting a scene of learning or discovery. One child stands at the front, reaching toward the table, while the adult figure stands behind, holding a shield-like object. The figures are rendered in a realistic style, with detailed clothing and expressive postures. The platform consists of several stone tiles, and a large round plaque or shield leans against the table. The entire composition is cast in a dark, metallic material, likely bronze, with a weathered patina.
description: A realistic bronze sculpture of three figures—two children and an adult—gathered around a table with a bust and various objects, all set on a stone platform.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the adult and one child facing the table, with the bust and bird clearly visible atop the table and the shield-like object leaning against it.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the table, showing the child reaching toward the objects and the adult figure standing behind, with the round plaque prominent.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a rear angle, focusing on the back of the child and adult, with the table and bust partially visible.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the figures from behind, emphasizing the postures of the children and the adult, with the table and objects seen from the opposite side.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures around a table with a bust and objects
attribute_location_context: outdoor paved area, likely a plaza or public square
